preferred_label.description: Verification verdict: true (valid), false (invalid), empty (no illuminations found)

illumination_path.description: Absolute or relative path to the selected illumination file

summary.description: One-paragraph summary of what the illumination proposes

explanation.description: Verification findings: why the illumination is or isn't valid

archive_reason_short.description: Shell-safe one-line reason suitable for archived frontmatter. ALWAYS emit. On preferred_label='false' (remove_gate → Archive path): verification reason. On preferred_label='true' (approval_gate → Decline path): placeholder 'Declined at approval gate' — consumed only if user later declines. On preferred_label='empty': empty string. One sentence, ≤100 chars, no newlines, no shell metacharacters (no $, `, ", ', \, ;, |, &, <, >, (, ), {, }).
